description_long: This object is a single mushroom with a broad, rounded cap that is light brown with subtle darker and lighter mottling. The cap surface appears smooth with a slightly depressed center and a gentle, natural sheen. The margin of the cap is curved and even, with no visible striations or waviness. A short, thick stem is visible from some angles, showing a rougher, fibrous texture and a slightly off-white to brown coloration. The gills beneath the cap are not visible in any of the views, suggesting they are either obscured or not present. The mushroom appears fresh and intact, with natural color variations and a realistic organic form.
description: A realistic, light brown mushroom with a smooth, rounded cap and a short, thick stem. The cap has a slightly depressed center and subtle color mottling.
description_view_0: The mushroom is seen mostly from the side, showing the broad, smooth cap with a slight depression in the center and only a hint of the stem visible beneath.
description_view_1: This view reveals the short, thick stem extending downward from the cap, with the cap's smooth surface and mottled brown coloration clearly visible.
description_view_2: The cap is prominent with its rounded, smooth surface and subtle color variations, while the stem is partially visible, extending outward at an angle.
description_view_3: The cap dominates the view, showing its smooth, curved margin and gentle depression in the center, with the stem almost entirely hidden.
